# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
// Register the plugin
add_action('plugins_loaded', 'register_user_authentication_plugin');
function register_user_authentication_plugin() {
    register_activation_hook(__FILE__, 'install_user_authentication_plugin');
    add_action('init', 'load_user_authentication_plugin_textdomain');
    add_shortcode('user_authentication', 'user_authentication_shortcode');
}

// Install the plugin
function install_user_authentication_plugin() {
    // Create user table
    $user_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'users';
    $sql = "CREATE TABLE $user_table (
        id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
        username VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
        password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
        email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
        PRIMARY KEY (id)
    )";
    $wpdb->query($sql);
}

// Load the plugin text domain
function load_user_authentication_plugin_textdomain() {
    load_plugin_textdomain('user-authentication', false, basename(dirname(__FILE__)) . '/languages');
}

// User authentication shortcode
function user_authentication_shortcode($atts) {
    // Get the user's username and password
    $username = sanitize_text_field($_POST['username']);
    $password = sanitize_text_field($_POST['password']);

    // Check if the user is already registered
    $user = get_user_by('username', $username);

    if ($user) {
        // Verify the user's password
        if (wp_check_password($password, $user->password, $user->ID)) {
            // Login the user
            wp_set_current_user($user->ID);
            wp_redirect(home_url());
            exit;
        }
    }

    // Display the login form
    ?>
    <form action="" method="post">
        <label for="username"><?php _e('Username:', 'user-authentication'); ?></label>
        <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
        <label for="password"><?php _e('Password:', 'user-authentication'); ?></label>
        <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
        <input type="submit" value="<?php _e('Login', 'user-authentication'); ?>">
    </form>
    <?php
}
